What I Do

Skills & Expertise

Bridging the gap between technical precision and visual storytelling.

🧊

3D Modeling & Design

Creating realistic models, environments, and visualizations in Blender. Specializing in architectural and spatial design.

✨

Photorealistic Rendering

Producing high-quality renders and animations for client presentations, product demos, and proposal documents.

🗺️

Wayfinding Systems

Designing detailed environment mockups that visualize how wayfinding integrates within real architectural layouts.

🎨

Graphic Design

Crafting promotional and branding materials — flyers, brochures, banners, and posters using Photoshop.

🌐

Web Design

Building responsive, visually compelling websites using HTML, CSS & JavaScript for modern digital experiences.

🤝

UX Collaboration

Working alongside UX teams to optimize positioning, user interaction flow, and digital navigation interfaces.

About Me

Crafting worlds in three dimensions

I'm Thoufic, a 3D Designer based in Pudukkottai with a focus on creating realistic models and visualizations for wayfinding systems in airports, malls, and public spaces.

Currently at Dreamsoft Technology, I design both immersive 3D environments and compelling graphic materials that serve real-world clients and architectural briefs.
